dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THIS IS HIS WORLD

dialogue.line: CELEBRITY WHO GOES DANCING THE MOST OVERRATED CELEBRITY SINGING, DANCING, WHATSOEVER: BY MANIPULATED AND AUTHORED. SPONSOR BEHIND JUST LOUSY ALL A FAT MIDDLE AGED SPONSOR THERE MUST BE STRONG STOMACH CUZ SHE SOMEONE WITH, LIKE SHIT LOL

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: NO NEED FOR MORALS

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: AND EXPERIENCE THE GERMAN CARS. I OWN MERCEDES C63. THE TASTE IS SIMPLY THE BEST. NO ONE CAN. WILL BE GOING FOR SOMETHING HIGHER THAN OF COURSE IN NEXT YEAR. SUCKS AND BENTLEY IS TOO MUCH. THE GERMAN THREE BRANDS. BUT MASERATI RECOMMENDATIONS. OH IF ANYONE, WHAT SHOULD I GET? GIVE ME SOME TRAITORS. APP NOR TRUTH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A WORLD OF DISTORTED DESIRES

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: Son, you're really not going?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Vacation my ass.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: I'm not going.

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: How about some fresh air for a change?

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: It's been so long since you left your room. This may be the last family trip before your father leaves on business again...

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: I'm not going.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: And I told you not to talk to me anymore. I hate hearing your voice.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Shit!

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: Those fucking idiots are in my party again.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: We're going to get slaughtered.

dialogue.speaker: FAMILY (note)
dialogue.line: Mom, don't skip your meal. We'll be back.

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: That idiot. When is he going to grow up?!

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: He's turning into one of those hikikomori...

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: What kind of mother are you, to let him behave like that?

dialogue.speaker: SISTER
dialogue.line: It's not Mom's fault! What are you blaming her for?

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: Oh? Now you've joined the rebellion too? Jesus Christ. Whenever I'm away, even for just a bit, this house becomes a mess. A mess!

dialogue.speaker: SISTER
dialogue.line: Dad, you're being ridiculous.

dialogue.speaker: SISTER
dialogue.line: And why don't you ever feel responsible for Hyun? Maybe if you were home more, he wouldn't be like this! How is it all Mom's fault?!

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: Wow. I can't believe this. This is what I get after all I've sacrificed for you kids? You have no idea, no idea how I work my butt off to put food on our table.

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: Okay, that's enough. Let's not ruin our vacation.

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: Yeah, yeah; just leave it there!

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: It's all my fault, my fault, my fault! Damn it!

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: Come on everyone, let's lighten up a bit. We have a good day ahead of us.

dialogue.speaker: SISTER
dialogue.line: You're right. I'm sorry, Dad.

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: I am too, sweetie. It's just that whenever I see Hyun, I can't stop myself from being angry, you know?

dialogue.speaker: SISTER
dialogue.line: Dad! Look out!

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: Damn it! Who is it?

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: Stand!

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: Why do you keep calling in the mid...? What? Yes.

dialogue.speaker: DAD
dialogue.line: Yes, that's my family.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Eighteen-year-old high school student Hyun Cha. A social recluse with a history of self-harm, refusing to go to school. Lost his family and is now alone.

summary: The episode introduces Hyun, a reclusive high school student, who refuses to join his family on vacation, leading to a heated argument. The family's trip is abruptly interrupted by a car accident, leaving Hyun alone.
